title: Work safely with hydrogen in the automotive industry
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work safely with hydrogen in the automotive industry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Follow hydrogen-related workplace safety procedures

pcs.text: Identify and follow workplace procedures related to hydrogen safety in automotive industry workplaces
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow workplace procedures related to hydrogen safety in automotive industry workplaces?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow workplace procedures related to hydrogen safety in automotive industry workplaces.

pcs.text: Inspect workplace and identify and report unsafe situations and hazards related to hydrogen according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect workplace and identify and report unsafe situations and hazards related to hydrogen according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect workplace and identify and report unsafe situations and hazards related to hydrogen according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use hydrogen gas detector according to manufacturer specifications to identify hydrogen gas leaks in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use hydrogen gas detector according to manufacturer specifications to identify hydrogen gas leaks in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use hydrogen gas detector according to manufacturer specifications to identify hydrogen gas leaks in the workplace.

pcs.text: Identify and follow workplace procedures and safety requirements for handling and storing hydrogen gas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow workplace procedures and safety requirements for handling and storing hydrogen gas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow workplace procedures and safety requirements for handling and storing hydrogen gas.

elements.title: Follow hydrogen-related workplace emergency procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate hydrogen-related emergency situations to first responders and coworkers.

pcs.text: Complete hydrogen-related incident documentation requirements according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete hydrogen-related incident documentation requirements according to workplace procedures.
